name: Design Lead - Design Approved - WMS
description: Sends an internal email notification with project details to the "Design Lead" when a deal is in "Design & Engineering" stage and has "Design Approved" status.

fields.subject: Design Approved - {{ enrolled_object.dealname }}
fields.body:
DA has been signed by the customer on {{ enrolled_object.layout_approval_date }}. The DA Turnaround Time was {{ enrolled_object.time_between_da_sent_and_da_approved }}.


Please verify the equipment details below from the line items are accurate:

System Size: {{ enrolled_object.calculated_system_size__kwdc_ }} kWDC / {{ enrolled_object.system_size_kwac }} kWAC
Total Energy Storage Capacity: {{ enrolled_object.energy_storage_capacity_kwh }} kWh

Modules: ({{ enrolled_object.module_count }}) {{ enrolled_object.modules }} ({{ enrolled_object.dc_size_of_module }}W) 
Inverter: ({{ enrolled_object.inverter_qty }}) {{ enrolled_object.inverter }} ({{ enrolled_object.inverter_size_kwac }} kWAC)

Battery: ({{ enrolled_object.battery_count }}) {{ enrolled_object.battery }} ({{ enrolled_object.battery_inverter_size_kwac }} kWAC)


Battery Expansion: ({{ enrolled_object.battery_expansion_count }}) {{ enrolled_object.battery_expansion }} 


EVs: {{ enrolled_object.ev_count }}
